Class AsyncQueryBuilder<T>

java.lang.Object
com.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.async.AsyncQueryBuilder<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of the item
public class AsyncQueryBuilder<T> extends Object
A fluent async builder for querying items in a DynamoDB table.

Mirrors the sync QueryBuilder but returns CompletableFuture from all execution methods and uses the AWS SDK's async PagePublisher under the hood.

Key conditions, filters, projections, sort order, pagination, and consistent read settings are all supported. For index-specific queries, use AsyncIndex instead.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    AsyncQueryBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbAsyncIndex<T> index)
    Constructs a new AsyncQueryBuilder for querying the given async secondary index.
    AsyncQueryBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbAsyncIndex<T> index, @Nullable software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.DynamoDbAsyncClient dynamoDbAsyncClient)
    Constructs a new AsyncQueryBuilder for querying the given async secondary index with a low-level client.
    AsyncQueryBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbAsyncTable<T> table)
    Constructs a new AsyncQueryBuilder for the given async table.
    AsyncQueryBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbAsyncTable<T> table, @Nullable software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.DynamoDbAsyncClient dynamoDbAsyncClient)
    Constructs a new AsyncQueryBuilder for the given async table with a low-level client.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T>
    ascending()
    Sets the query to return results in ascending sort key order (the default).
    @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T>
    consistentRead(boolean consistentRead)
    Enables or disables strongly consistent reads.
    @NonNull CompletableFuture<Long>
    count()
    Returns the total number of matching items asynchronously by iterating all query result pages.
    @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T>
    descending()
    Sets the query to return results in descending sort key order.
    @NonNull CompletableFuture<List<T>>
    executeAll()
    Executes the query asynchronously and returns all matching items aggregated from all pages.
    @NonNull CompletableFuture<Optional<T>>
    executeAndGetFirst()
    Executes the query asynchronously and returns the first matching item, if any.
    @NonNull CompletableFuture<software.amazon.awssdk.core.async.SdkPublisher<T>>
    executeStream()
    Returns a reactive publisher that lazily emits items as pages arrive.
    @NonNull CompletableFuture<PagedResult<T>>
    executeWithPagination()
    Executes the query asynchronously and returns only the first page of results along with the last evaluated key for pagination.
    @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T>
    filter(@Nullable FilterExpression filter)
    Configures a post-query filter expression from a pre-built FilterExpression.
    @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T>
    filter(@NonNull Map<String,Object> conditions)
    Configures a query filter from a map of attribute-value pairs.
    @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T>
    filter(@NonNull Consumer<FilterExpression> filterBuilder)
    Configures a post-query filter expression using a FilterExpression consumer.
    @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T>
    limit(int limit)
    Limits the number of items evaluated per page.
    @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T>
    partitionKey(@NonNull Object pkValue)
    Sets the key condition to match all items with the given partition key value.
    @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T>
    partitionKeyAndSortKeyBeginsWith(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull String skPrefix)
    Sets the key condition to match items whose sort key begins with the given prefix within the specified partition.
    @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T>
    partitionKeyAndSortKeyBetween(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull Object skLow, @NonNull Object skHigh)
    Sets the key condition to match items whose sort key falls within the specified range (inclusive) within the given partition.
    @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T>
    partitionKeyAndSortKeyEquals(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull Object skValue)
    Sets the key condition to match the item with the exact partition key and sort key values.
    @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T>
    partitionKeyAndSortKeyGreaterThan(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull Object skValue)
    Sets the key condition to match items whose sort key is strictly greater than the given value within the specified partition.
    @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T>
    partitionKeyAndSortKeyGreaterThanOrEqual(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull Object skValue)
    Sets the key condition to match items whose sort key is greater than or equal to the given value within the specified partition.
    @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T>
    partitionKeyAndSortKeyLessThan(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull Object skValue)
    Sets the key condition to match items whose sort key is strictly less than the given value within the specified partition.
    @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T>
    partitionKeyAndSortKeyLessThanOrEqual(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull Object skValue)
    Sets the key condition to match items whose sort key is less than or equal to the given value within the specified partition.
    @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T>
    project(@NonNull String... attributes)
    Restricts the returned attributes to the specified ones.
    @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T>
    project(@NonNull Consumer<ProjectionExpression> projectionBuilder)
    Restricts the returned attributes by configuring a ProjectionExpression via a consumer.
    @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T>
    returnConsumedCapacity(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.ReturnConsumedCapacity returnConsumedCapacity)
    Sets the return consumed capacity option for the query.

    Sets the select parameter for the query, controlling which attributes are returned.

    startFrom(@Nullable Map<String, software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.AttributeValue> lastEvaluatedKey)
    Sets the exclusive start key for paginated queries.

    • AsyncQueryBuilder

      public AsyncQueryBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbAsyncTable<T> table)
      Constructs a new AsyncQueryBuilder for the given async table.
      Parameters:
      table - the async DynamoDB table

    • AsyncQueryBuilder

      public AsyncQueryBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbAsyncIndex<T> index)
      Constructs a new AsyncQueryBuilder for querying the given async secondary index.
      Parameters:
      index - the async DynamoDB secondary index

    • AsyncQueryBuilder

      public AsyncQueryBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbAsyncTable<T> table, @Nullable software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.DynamoDbAsyncClient dynamoDbAsyncClient)
      Constructs a new AsyncQueryBuilder for the given async table with a low-level client.
      Parameters:
      table - the async DynamoDB table
      dynamoDbAsyncClient - the low-level async DynamoDB client (nullable)

    • AsyncQueryBuilder

      public AsyncQueryBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbAsyncIndex<T> index, @Nullable software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.DynamoDbAsyncClient dynamoDbAsyncClient)
      Constructs a new AsyncQueryBuilder for querying the given async secondary index with a low-level client.
      Parameters:
      index - the async DynamoDB secondary index
      dynamoDbAsyncClient - the low-level async DynamoDB client (nullable)

  • Method Details

    • partitionKey

      public @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T> partitionKey(@NonNull Object pkValue)
      Sets the key condition to match all items with the given partition key value.
      Parameters:
      pkValue - the partition key value
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • partitionKeyAndSortKeyEquals

      public @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T> partitionKeyAndSortKeyEquals(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull Object skValue)
      Sets the key condition to match the item with the exact partition key and sort key values.
      Parameters:
      pkValue - the partition key value
      skValue - the sort key value
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • partitionKeyAndSortKeyBeginsWith

      public @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T> partitionKeyAndSortKeyBeginsWith(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull String skPrefix)
      Sets the key condition to match items whose sort key begins with the given prefix within the specified partition.
      Parameters:
      pkValue - the partition key value
      skPrefix - the sort key prefix string
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • partitionKeyAndSortKeyBetween

      public @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T> partitionKeyAndSortKeyBetween(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull Object skLow, @NonNull Object skHigh)
      Sets the key condition to match items whose sort key falls within the specified range (inclusive) within the given partition.
      Parameters:
      pkValue - the partition key value
      skLow - the lower bound of the sort key range (inclusive)
      skHigh - the upper bound of the sort key range (inclusive)
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • partitionKeyAndSortKeyGreaterThan

      public @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T> partitionKeyAndSortKeyGreaterThan(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull Object skValue)
      Sets the key condition to match items whose sort key is strictly greater than the given value within the specified partition.
      Parameters:
      pkValue - the partition key value
      skValue - the sort key threshold (exclusive)
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • partitionKeyAndSortKeyGreaterThanOrEqual

      public @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T> partitionKeyAndSortKeyGreaterThanOrEqual(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull Object skValue)
      Sets the key condition to match items whose sort key is greater than or equal to the given value within the specified partition.
      Parameters:
      pkValue - the partition key value
      skValue - the sort key threshold (inclusive)
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • partitionKeyAndSortKeyLessThan

      public @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T> partitionKeyAndSortKeyLessThan(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull Object skValue)
      Sets the key condition to match items whose sort key is strictly less than the given value within the specified partition.
      Parameters:
      pkValue - the partition key value
      skValue - the sort key threshold (exclusive)
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • partitionKeyAndSortKeyLessThanOrEqual

      public @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T> partitionKeyAndSortKeyLessThanOrEqual(@NonNull Object pkValue, @NonNull Object skValue)
      Sets the key condition to match items whose sort key is less than or equal to the given value within the specified partition.
      Parameters:
      pkValue - the partition key value
      skValue - the sort key threshold (inclusive)
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • filter

      public @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T> filter(@NonNull Consumer<FilterExpression> filterBuilder)
      Configures a post-query filter expression using a FilterExpression consumer.
      Parameters:
      filterBuilder - a consumer that configures the FilterExpression
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • filter

      public @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T> filter(@Nullable FilterExpression filter)
      Configures a post-query filter expression from a pre-built FilterExpression.
      Parameters:
      filter - the filter expression
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • filter

      public @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T> filter(@NonNull Map<String,Object> conditions)
      Configures a query filter from a map of attribute-value pairs.

      All conditions are combined with AND. Each entry is treated as an equality filter. For other condition types, use the consumer-based filter(Consumer) method.

      Parameters:
      conditions - a map of attribute names to their expected values
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • project

      public @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T> project(@NonNull String... attributes)
      Restricts the returned attributes to the specified ones.
      Parameters:
      attributes - the attribute names to include in the result
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • project

      public @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T> project(@NonNull Consumer<ProjectionExpression> projectionBuilder)
      Restricts the returned attributes by configuring a ProjectionExpression via a consumer.
      Parameters:
      projectionBuilder - a consumer that configures the ProjectionExpression
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • descending

      public @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T> descending()
      Sets the query to return results in descending sort key order.
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • ascending

      public @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T> ascending()
      Sets the query to return results in ascending sort key order (the default).
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • limit

      public @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T> limit(int limit)
      Limits the number of items evaluated per page.
      Parameters:
      limit - the maximum number of items to evaluate per page
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • startFrom

      public @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T> startFrom(@Nullable Map<String, software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.AttributeValue> lastEvaluatedKey)
      Sets the exclusive start key for paginated queries. Typically obtained from the PagedResult.lastEvaluatedKey() of a previous query.
      Parameters:
      lastEvaluatedKey - the key map from which to start the next page
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • consistentRead

      public @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T> consistentRead(boolean consistentRead)
      Enables or disables strongly consistent reads.
      Parameters:
      consistentRead - true for a strongly consistent read, false (the default) for an eventually consistent read
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • returnConsumedCapacity

      public @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T> returnConsumedCapacity(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.ReturnConsumedCapacity returnConsumedCapacity)
      Sets the return consumed capacity option for the query.
      Parameters:
      returnConsumedCapacity - the return consumed capacity value
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • select

      public @NonNull AsyncQueryBuilder<T> select(@Nullable software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.Select select)
      Sets the select parameter for the query, controlling which attributes are returned. Use Select.COUNT to request only the item count from the server.
      Parameters:
      select - the select parameter (nullable)
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • executeAll

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<List<T>> executeAll()
      Executes the query asynchronously and returns all matching items aggregated from all pages.

      Memory warning: This method eagerly loads all matching items into memory. If the result set may be large, consider using executeAsPages() or paginated methods such as executeWithPagination() to process items incrementally.

      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture containing a list of matching items

    • executeWithPagination

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<PagedResult<T>> executeWithPagination()
      Executes the query asynchronously and returns only the first page of results along with the last evaluated key for pagination.
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture containing a PagedResult with the first page of items and the last evaluated key (may be null if no more pages)

    • executeAndGetFirst

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Optional<T>> executeAndGetFirst()
      Executes the query asynchronously and returns the first matching item, if any.
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture containing an Optional with the first item, or empty if no items match

    • executeStream

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<software.amazon.awssdk.core.async.SdkPublisher<T>> executeStream()
      Returns a reactive publisher that lazily emits items as pages arrive.

      Unlike executeAll() which loads all pages into memory, this method streams items one-by-one as each page is received from DynamoDB.

      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture containing an SdkPublisher that emits query items
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if called with Select.COUNT

    • count

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Long> count()
      Returns the total number of matching items asynchronously by iterating all query result pages.

      When a low-level DynamoDbAsyncClient is available, uses Select.COUNT server-side to avoid transferring item data. Falls back to the enhanced client page iteration otherwise.

      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture containing the total count of matching items
